notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing hits a grand slam (4) to center field. Teoscar Hernández scores. Max Muncy scores. Andy Pages scores.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez hit by pitch. Bo Bichette to 2nd.
